name: Eric Clapton

acts.description: 1976 on-stage racist tirade calling for deportation of Black people from Britain, endorsing Enoch Powell
Recorded and promoted anti-vaccine misinformation songs during COVID-19 pandemic

behavior_summary: 1976 racist rant onstage is documented; was the catalyst for Rock Against Racism movement. Recent COVID misinformation campaign. Notable hypocrite given his career was built on Black American musical traditions.

art.summary: Guitar legend, Cream, Derek and the Dominos. Helped introduce electric blues to mainstream rock. Canonical status is real.

accountability_events: 1976 racist tirade, sparked Rock Against Racism

verdict.blurb: Built an entire career on Black American music traditions, then got onstage and called for the removal of Black people from Britain. Slowhand, fast racism.
